heading: Definitions
label: 19291 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis part, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle J (§§ 10701–10727) of title VI of div. B of , which is classified principally to this part. For complete classification of subtitle J to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 117–167

children.heading: Clean energy technology
children.label: 1 Clean energy technology
children.text: The term “clean energy technology” means a technology that significantly reduces energy use, increases energy efficiency, reduces greenhouse gas emissions, reduces emissions of other pollutants, or mitigates other negative environmental consequences of energy production, transmission or use.

children.heading: Department
children.label: 2 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Energy.

children.heading: Director
children.label: 3 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of each National Laboratory and the Director of each Department of Energy single-purpose research facility.

children.heading: Economically distressed area
children.label: 4 Economically distressed area
children.text: The term “economically distressed area” has the meaning described in .section 3161(a) of this title

children.heading: Grant
children.label: 5 Grant
children.text: The term “grant” means a grant award, cooperative agreement award, or any other financial assistance arrangement that the Secretary of Energy determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Institution of higher education
children.label: 6 Institution of higher education
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given such term in .section 1001 of title 20

children.heading: National Laboratory
children.label: 7 National Laboratory
children.text: The term “National Laboratory” has the meaning given that term in .section 15801 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 8 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Energy.
